hooks.command: node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>chunks.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ try{ const d=JSON.parse(Buffer.concat(chunks)); const fp=(d.tool_input||{}).file_path||''; if(fp.endsWith('skills-lock.json')){ const fs=require('fs'); const c=fs.readFileSync(fp,'utf8'); if(c.includes('graphify')){ require('child_process').execSync('graphify install --platform claude-code',{stdio:'inherit'}); } } }catch(e){} });"
